---
title: "Yellow Island Intertidal Monitoring"
subtitle: "Methods Notes"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

### Methods Overview

### Quick Links

1.  Project repo

2.  Process/ Workflow

3.  Literature

### Research Questions

### Methods Decisions

### Log

#### 2026-03-24

Setting up the workflow with the minimum to determine if this system is going to work for me.
